the error occurs because the main application is compiled for .net 7 and the wpf window is dynamically linked to it. inside the application, the wpf window is loaded from the main application's assembly, but when running on mac, the cocoa framework does not recognize the wpf assembly. money is involved in the cross platform setup, as the main application needs to be compatible with both windows and mac. the network between the main application and the wpf window is crucial for the dynamic linking to work. travel is part of the process, as the application must be able to handle different operating systems and their respective frameworks.
